description: OneUptime is an open-source observability and incident management platform. It provides monitoring, status pages, alerts, on-call, logs, metrics, traces, and related operational tooling.
summary: OneUptime exposes a REST API, a public MCP server endpoint at `https://oneuptime.com/mcp`, and a `oneuptime` CLI; the REST API and CLI use OneUptime API keys, while the seeded cloud MCP endpoint is public.
